query: SELECT id, name, neighborhood, address, instagram FROM establishments WHERE (neighborhood LIKE '%Vila Madalena%' OR neighborhood LIKE '%Pinheiros%') AND (instagram IS NULL OR instagram = '') AND hidden = 0 ORDER BY neighborhood, name LIMIT 100;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway06.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 4LUtXE4vPqQU3CD.root --database WG3U3sVg2ZrW6m8T99FRdE --execute SELECT id, name, neighborhood, address, instagram FROM establishments WHERE (neighborhood LIKE '%Vila Madalena%' OR neighborhood LIKE '%Pinheiros%') AND (instagram IS NULL OR instagram = '') AND hidden = 0 ORDER BY neighborhood, name LIMIT 100;

rows.name: Bullger
